subject: Geology
title: Defining Geology
description: A quick win: understand Defining Geology.

hook.text: Every mountain, canyon, and coastline has a story. Geology is the science of reading the Earth itself.

buildup.text: Geology studies rocks, minerals, and the processes that shape our planet over millions of years.

discovery.text: It covers everything from tiny crystals to drifting continents to the deep iron core beneath our feet.

twist.text: Geology also looks forward. It predicts eruptions, finds water, and warns us about future hazards.

climax.text: The Earth is not static. Geology reveals a planet in constant, slow motion, always building and destroying.

punchline.text: The ground beneath you is never still.
